channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Ukraine strikes key Russian oil port and refinery
item.description: Ukraine said it hit a key Russian oil terminal at Primorsk and a refinery in Ufa on Monday.

item.title: What Trump said about Iran after postponing military strikes
item.description: After announcing the US will postpone strikes on Iran’s power plants, Donald Trump said Iran called him to make a deal.

item.title: Air Canada crash at LaGuardia Airport: What happened, who were the victims?
item.description: The pilot and co-pilot were killed, and in total, 41 passengers were taken to hospital, along with two firefighters.

item.title: Tehran residents express distrust over Trump’s war diplomacy
Iran denies any talks with US after Trump claims ‘productive’ discussions
item.description: Iran parliament speaker says US president using idea of talks to 'escape quagmire in which US and Israel are trapped'.

item.title: Why the oil and gas price shock from the Iran war won’t just fade away
item.description: Rerouting and diversification cannot help when a significant chunk of oil and gas have been taken off the market.

item.title: How the Iran war is about to hit your wallet
item.description: Strikes on gas sites in the Iran war are driving up energy costs, pushing up prices for power, food and more worldwide.

item.title: Trump can declare victory in Iran – and he should
item.description: The US president has proven that hitting hard and fast rather than engaging in endless negotiations guarantees victory.

item.title: How Israel is reacting to Trump’s ‘de-escalation’ with Iran
item.description: There is expected to be pushback from Israel following President Donald Trump’s move towards de-escalation with Iran.

item.title: Israeli strike on Lebanon bridge raises fears of ground invasion
item.description: Lebanon fears that Israel’s attack on Qasmiyeh Bridge could be a “prelude to a ground invasion”.
